title: Provider-Specific Strategy Adapters
content: Refactor AIService using the Strategy Pattern. Introduce specialized adapters for each provider (OpenAIAdapter, AnthropicAdapter, GeminiAdapter). Each adapter handles its own reasoning logic, parameter translation (e.g., mapping settings.temperature to reasoning_effort), and 'thinking' block removal from responses. This isolates provider-specific quirks and simplifies future provider additions.
result: PASS: Prototype successfully demonstrated that specialized strategy classes (OpenAIStrategy, AnthropicStrategy) correctly encapsulate divergent API shapes (e.g., max_completion_tokens vs thinking budget).
